leadText: The Poké Toy (Japanese: ポケじゃらし Poké Toy) is an item introduced in Generation V. It can be used to escape from a battle with a wild Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during a battle with a wild Pokémon , it allows the player to escape instantly regardless of any factors that would otherwise prevent escape.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 An item that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon. X Y A toy that attracts the attention of a Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with a wild Pokémon. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A toy that attracts the attention of a Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon. S V A toy that attracts the attention of Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon.

sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.5 Other appearances In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price B W B2 W2 OR AS $ 1,000 $ 500 X Y N/A $ 500 S M N/A $ 50 US UM $ 100 $ 50 Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during a battle with a wild Pokémon , it allows the player to escape instantly regardless of any factors that would otherwise prevent escape. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 An item that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon. X Y A toy that attracts the attention of a Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with a wild Pokémon. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A toy that attracts the attention of a Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon. S V A toy that attracts the attention of Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B W Shopping Mall Nine B2 W2 Route 4 , Virbank City Shopping Mall Nine Big Stadium and Small Court (defeat Preschooler Evan) X Y Coumarine City Pokémon Village ( shaking trash cans ) OR AS Mauville City Lilycove Department Store S M US UM All Poké Marts (after completing 1 trial) US UM Festival Plaza ( Battle Store ) Other appearances [ edit | edit source ] While not obtainable as an item in Pokémon Sword and Shield , a Poké Toy appears as one of the toys the player can use to play with their Pokémon in Pokémon Camp .

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Poké Toy appears to be based on Minccino 's tail.
